steps.t: Speak to the Blackwold guard. If your ruse is successful, he should give you access to the hideout. Toradan sent you to Skunkwood's hideout to rescue …
Skunkwood resides somewhere within the hideout. You have tricked your way into the Blackwolds' hideout. Now you must find Skunkwood and speak with him…
Amdir lies in the dungeons at the far end of the Blackwold hideout. Skunkwood told you that Amdir was locked away and that what was happening to him s…
You have discovered Amdir and found that he has partially transformed into a wraith. He stopped raving at the sight of you, so perhaps there is still …
An old woman in the back of the cell that held Amdir called to you for help. You should help her escape. Whatever is happening to Amdir, it has driven…
After helping Sara Oakheart out of the Blackwold hideout, Toradan entered and saw what had become of Amdir. Seeing his kinsman too far gone to help, T…
Toradan spoke about Amdir trying to kill the other Rangers and asked you to speak with Constable Underhill about a message he sent to someone named Ta…
